name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with 30-hour battery life. Multipoint connection lets you pair two devices simultaneously. Crystal clear hands-free calling.

name: Apple MacBook Air M3 13-inch
description: M3 chip delivers up to 60% faster performance than M1. All-day 18-hour battery life. Fanless design stays silent under load.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse
description: 8000 DPI any-surface tracking. MagSpeed electromagnetic scrolling. Quiet clicks. 70-day battery. Works on glass surfaces.

name: Samsung 4K QLED Smart TV 55-inch
description: Quantum HDR with Quantum Dot technology. Neural Quantum Processor 4K upscales content. Object Tracking Sound follows the action.

name: GoPro HERO12 Black Action Camera
description: 5.3K60 and 4K120 video. 27MP photos. HyperSmooth 6.0 stabilization. Waterproof to 10m without a housing.

name: iPad Pro 12.9-inch M4
description: Ultra Retina XDR OLED display. M4 chip. Wi-Fi 6E. Works with Apple Pencil Pro and Magic Keyboard.

name: Anker PowerCore 26800 Portable Charger
description: 26800mAh capacity. Charges iPhone 15 up to 6.5 times. Dual USB-C and USB-A ports.

name: Minimal Linen Shirt — Cream
description: Crafted from 100% European linen. Relaxed-fit, breathes beautifully in warm weather. Classic collar, chest pocket, mother-of-pearl buttons.

name: Classic Chelsea Boots — Tan Suede
description: Handcrafted from premium tan suede with a leather lining. Elastic side panels ensure a snug fit. Durable rubber sole.

name: Merino Wool Crewneck Sweater
description: Extra-fine 18.5-micron Merino wool. Naturally temperature-regulating and odor-resistant. Machine washable.

name: Slim Fit Chino Trousers — Navy
description: Tailored slim fit from stretch cotton-twill blend. Four-pocket design. Easy-care fabric resists wrinkles.

name: Leather Bifold Wallet — Cognac
description: Full-grain vegetable-tanned leather. 6 card slots, 2 cash compartments. Slim profile fits in front pocket.

name: Lodge Cast Iron Skillet 10.25-inch
description: Pre-seasoned and ready to use. Works on all cooktops including induction. Gets better with every use. Made in the USA.

name: Vitamix 5200 Professional Blender
description: Variable speed control. Hot soups and cold smoothies in the same container. Aircraft-grade stainless steel blades. 10-year warranty.

name: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
description: Laser reveals microscopic dust. Acoustic piezo sensor counts and sizes particles. 60 minutes of run time.

name: Philips Hue Starter Kit — 4 Bulbs
description: 16 million colors. Voice control via Alexa, Google Assistant, and Siri. 25000-hour lifespan. Zigbee hub included.

name: KitchenAid Stand Mixer 5-Quart
description: 67 touchpoints around the bowl. 10 speeds. 59 available attachments. Tilts back for easy bowl access. Made in the USA.

name: Atomic Habits — James Clear
description: A groundbreaking book about building good habits and breaking bad ones. Over 15 million copies sold worldwide.

name: The Pragmatic Programmer — 20th Anniversary Edition
description: Completely revised and updated. The core process of writing robust, adaptable, maintainable code. Essential for every developer.

name: Deep Work — Cal Newport
description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world. Deep work is both rare and extremely valuable in our economy.

name: Thinking, Fast and Slow — Daniel Kahneman
description: Nobel laureate explains the two systems that drive the way we think. System 1 is fast and intuitive; System 2 is slower and logical.

name: Garmin Forerunner 965 GPS Running Watch
description: AMOLED display. Up to 31 days battery in smartwatch mode. Daily Suggested Workouts. Training Readiness score. Music storage.

name: Bowflex SelectTech 552 Adjustable Dumbbells
description: Adjusts from 5 to 52.5 lbs in 2.5-lb increments. Replaces 15 sets of weights. 2-year warranty included.

name: Manduka PRO Yoga Mat 6mm
description: Lifetime guarantee. Dense 6mm cushioning protects joints. Closed-cell surface prevents sweat absorption. Non-slip texture.

name: Hydro Flask 32oz Wide Mouth Water Bottle
description: TempShield double-wall vacuum insulation. Cold 24 hours, hot 12 hours. Certified BPA-free.
